name: Avocado Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor fitted with a chopping blade, puree the avocado with the garlic.
2. Add the lime juice and chopped herbs to the food processor. Process until smooth.
3. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
4. Stir in the avocado puree into the saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally.
5. Continue cooking until heated through.
6. Gradually add the cream, stirring constantly. Heat gently but do not allow to boil.
7. Season with salt to taste.
8. Serve immediately.
